Package com.sun.identity.console.federation.model

Interface WSFedPropertiesModel

  • All Superinterfaces:
    AMAdminConstants, AMModel, EntityModel
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    WSFedPropertiesModelImpl
    public interface WSFedPropertiesModel
extends EntityModel

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      String getClaimType​(FederationElement fedElem)
      Returns display name of claim type.
      Map getDualRoleAttributes()
      Returns a map of wsfed general attribute values for dual role.
      FederationElement getEntityDesc​(String realm, String fedid)
      Returns FederationElement Object for the realm and fedid passed.
      Map getGenAttributes()
      Returns a map of wsfed general attribute values.
      Map getIdentityProviderAttributes​(String realm, String fedid)
      Returns a map with identity provider attributes and values.
      Map getIDPEXDataMap()
      Returns a map of Wsfed Extended Identity Provider attribute values.
      Map getIDPSTDDataMap()
      Returns a map of Wsfed Standard Identity Provider attribute values.
      Map getServiceProviderAttributes​(String realm, String fedid)
      Returns a map with service provider attributes and values.
      Map getSPEXDataMap()
      Returns a map of Wsfed Extended Service Provider attribute values.
      String getTokenEndpoint​(FederationElement fedElem)
      Returns TokenIssuerEndPoint for the FederationElement passed.
      String getTokenName​(FederationElement fedElem)
      Returns TokenIssuerName for the FederationElement passed.
      void setGenAttributeValues​(String realm, String fedId, Map idpStdValues, String role, String location)
      Saves the standard attribute values from the General page.
      void setIDPExtAttributeValues​(String realm, String fedId, Map idpExtValues, String location)
      Saves the extended metadata attribute values for the IDP.
      void setIDPSTDAttributeValues​(String entityName, Map idpStdValues, String realm, Map idpExtValues, String location)
      Saves the standard attribute values for the IDP.
      void setSPExtAttributeValues​(String realm, String fedId, Map spExtvalues, String location)
      Saves the extended metadata attribute values for the SP.

    • Method Detail

      • getServiceProviderAttributes

        Map getServiceProviderAttributes​(String realm,
                                 String fedid)
                          throws AMConsoleException
        Returns a map with service provider attributes and values.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedid - is the entity id.
        Returns:
        attribute values of SP based on realm and fedid passed.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if unable to retreive the Service Provider attrubutes based on the realm and fedid passed.

      • getIdentityProviderAttributes

        Map getIdentityProviderAttributes​(String realm,
                                  String fedid)
                           throws AMConsoleException
        Returns a map with identity provider attributes and values.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedid - is the entity id.
        Returns:
        attribute values of IDP based on realm and fedid passed.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if unable to retreive the Identity Provider attrubutes based on the realm and fedid passed.

      • getEntityDesc

        FederationElement getEntityDesc​(String realm,
                                String fedid)
                         throws AMConsoleException
        Returns FederationElement Object for the realm and fedid passed.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedid - is the entity id.
        Returns:
        FederationElement Object for the realm and fedid passed.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if unable to retrieve the FederationElement Object.

      • getTokenName

        String getTokenName​(FederationElement fedElem)
        Returns TokenIssuerName for the FederationElement passed.
        Parameters:
        fedElem - the FederationElement Object.
        Returns:
        TokenIssuerName for the FederationElement passed.

      • getTokenEndpoint

        String getTokenEndpoint​(FederationElement fedElem)
        Returns TokenIssuerEndPoint for the FederationElement passed.
        Parameters:
        fedElem - is the FederationElement Object.
        Returns:
        TokenIssuerEndPoint for the FederationElement passed.

      • getClaimType

        String getClaimType​(FederationElement fedElem)
        Returns display name of claim type.
        Parameters:
        fedElem - is the FederationElement Object.
        Returns:
        display name of claim type.

      • setSPExtAttributeValues

        void setSPExtAttributeValues​(String realm,
                             String fedId,
                             Map spExtvalues,
                             String location)
                      throws AMConsoleException
        Saves the extended metadata attribute values for the SP.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedId - is the entity id.
        spExtvalues - contain the extended attribute values.
        location - has the information whether remote or hosted.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if saving of attribute value fails.

      • setIDPExtAttributeValues

        void setIDPExtAttributeValues​(String realm,
                              String fedId,
                              Map idpExtValues,
                              String location)
                       throws AMConsoleException
        Saves the extended metadata attribute values for the IDP.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedId - is the entity id.
        idpExtValues - contain attribute values.
        location - has the information whether remote or hosted.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if saving of attribute value fails.

      • setIDPSTDAttributeValues

        void setIDPSTDAttributeValues​(String entityName,
                              Map idpStdValues,
                              String realm,
                              Map idpExtValues,
                              String location)
                       throws AMConsoleException
        Saves the standard attribute values for the IDP.
        Parameters:
        entityName - is entityid.
        idpStdValues - contain standard attribute values of idp.
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        idpExtValues - contain extended attribute values.
        location - the information whether remote or hosted.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if saving of attribute value fails.

      • setGenAttributeValues

        void setGenAttributeValues​(String realm,
                           String fedId,
                           Map idpStdValues,
                           String role,
                           String location)
                    throws AMConsoleException
        Saves the standard attribute values from the General page.
        Parameters:
        realm - to which the entity belongs.
        fedId - is the entity id.
        idpStdValues - contain standard attribute values.
        role - is this entity an sp or idp.
        location - defines whether it is local or remote.
        Throws:
        AMConsoleException - if saving of attribute value fails.

      • getGenAttributes

        Map getGenAttributes()
        Returns a map of wsfed general attribute values.
        Returns:
        Map of wsfed general attribute values.

      • getDualRoleAttributes

        Map getDualRoleAttributes()
        Returns a map of wsfed general attribute values for dual role.
        Returns:
        Map of wsfed general attribute values for dual role.

      • getSPEXDataMap

        Map getSPEXDataMap()
        Returns a map of Wsfed Extended Service Provider attribute values.
        Returns:
        Map of Wsfed Extended Service Provider attribute values.

      • getIDPEXDataMap

        Map getIDPEXDataMap()
        Returns a map of Wsfed Extended Identity Provider attribute values.
        Returns:
        Map of Wsfed Extended Identity Provider attribute values.

      • getIDPSTDDataMap

        Map getIDPSTDDataMap()
        Returns a map of Wsfed Standard Identity Provider attribute values.
        Returns:
        Map of Wsfed Standard Identity Provider attribute values.
